title: Brazilian Expansion
description: Adds Brazilian Fauna and Flora and other things.
body:
![Capa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99acae0d5d0ed554df3b5b9d3739e529207dc14a.png)   

**Brazilian Expansion** is a mod focused on adding to the fauna and flora of Brazil, taking a bit of the essence of the 6 Brazilian biomes:

__▸ Amazon.__                                                                                    
__▸ Atlantic Forest.__                                                                                   
__▸ Cerrado.__                                                                                   
__▸ Caatinga.__                                                                                   
__▸ Pampa.__                                                                                   
__▸ Pantanal.__                                                                                   

In addition, the mod will also focus on some of Brazil's cultures, myths and legends, adding mystical and mysterious creatures to the mod.

![divisa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d1d0049fb0f1f060b85370fa682e394d6bbac0c.png)

### Requires
- [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/versions)
- [Terrablender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender)

**⚠️You will have problems with Optifine (used Embeddium)⚠️**

![divisa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d1d0049fb0f1f060b85370fa682e394d6bbac0c.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/fDS6NlDMonM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

_you can travel through the Amazon Jungles, navigate the rivers of the Pantanal, run through the fields of the Cerrado, burn yourself in the landscapes of the Catinga, explore the humid jungles of the Atlantic Forest or just enjoy the beautiful views of the Pampas. Be prepared to encounter ferocious creatures such as jaguars and alligators, or rare creatures such as the stunning maned wolf, or just enjoy the evening alongside docile creatures such as the capybara - it's up to you to decide how you will appreciate some of the culture of the Brazilian territory._
